_authoring_notes: FSI Offers Section 1 — Navy hero band. Matches RE Pros / Communities hub / Memberships hub navy hero pattern.
Eyebrow → H1 → audience-naming subhead → tagline → 2 CTAs.
Audience explicitly named ('built for real estate professionals') per locked decision. Page links from /communities/real-estate-professionals/; the primary funnel is RE pros.
CTAs differ from RE Pros hero (no CTAs there) because this IS a conversion page: free signup or Alliance contact. Primary CTA = Try It Free (fsioffers.com). Secondary = anchor to #your-tier section.
H1 bare per FSI Elementor convention — inherits The7 default Open Sans Condensed all-caps via specificity. Paragraphs keep explicit styles.
